title: Verify One Claim
summary: Choose one claim from an episode and compare two reliable sources plus one neutral context source.
steps: Write the claim in one sentence
Label fact, claim, theory, or open question

title: Map One Topic
summary: Pick an episode topic and connect it to one location, one timeline event, one person, and one book.

title: Journal After Listening
summary: Write what you believed before listening, what changed, and what still needs research.
